project_type: Expo React Native app (SDK 55) with Expo Router, NativeWind/Tailwind, Zustand state management
build_system: Expo CLI + EAS Build. Uses npx expo start for development. package.json scripts include typecheck (tsc --noEmit) and lint (expo lint). Uses --legacy-peer-deps for installs.
verification_instructions: 1. Run tsc --noEmit to verify TypeScript compiles without errors. 2. Verify no dangling imports to revenuecatClient. 3. Confirm app.json has Adapty plugins configured. 4. Confirm package.json has react-native-adapty and adaptyui-react-native, and does NOT have react-native-purchases or react-native-purchases-ui.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node 22 available. No physical device for runtime testing - validation is limited to TypeScript compilation and structural correctness.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code style: TypeScript strict mode, NativeWind className for styling, Zustand for state, expo-linear-gradient for gradients, react-native-reanimated for animations.
key_patterns: RevenueCat integration follows a wrapper pattern in src/lib/revenuecatClient.ts that lazily loads native modules and provides a guardRevenueCatUsage helper returning Result types. Subscription state is managed in Zustand store (src/lib/state/subscription-store.ts) with AsyncStorage persistence. AuthGate (src/components/AuthGate.tsx) verifies subscription on app start. PaywallScreen is step 20 in the onboarding flow. StandalonePaywall is shown post-onboarding for lapsed subscriptions. The app uses Inter and Fraunces fonts, lucide-react-native icons, SafeAreaView, and a gradient-heavy premium UI.
directory_structure: src/app/ - Expo Router screens and layouts; src/components/ - shared components; src/components/onboarding/ - 22-screen onboarding flow; src/lib/ - utilities, hooks, services, state stores; src/lib/state/ - Zustand stores; src/lib/services/ - notification, etc.
